karpathy.name: Andrej Karpathy
karpathy.headline: AI researcher and educator (ex-OpenAI founding member, ex-Tesla Sr. Director of AI, founder of Eureka Labs)

swyx.name: Shawn Wang
swyx.headline: Founder of Smol AI and AI Engineer; range inferred from an undisclosed Cognition deal, angel activity, and career earnings

crystalhuang.name: Crystal Huang
crystalhuang.headline: General Partner at GV; range inferred from senior venture compensation and carry, with no disclosed personal holdings

cshorten30.name: Connor Shorten
cshorten30.headline: Product researcher at Weaviate; range inferred from career earnings and possible employee equity, neither publicly disclosed

ericzelikman.name: Eric Zelikman
ericzelikman.headline: Humans& co-founder; range inferred from a hypothetical 5–15% stake at the reported $4.48B post-money valuation

jumbld.name: Rohit Agarwal
jumbld.headline: Portkey co-founder and CEO; range inferred from a reported $120M–$140M acquisition and undisclosed founder ownership

mathemagic1an.name: Jay Hack
mathemagic1an.headline: Founder of Codegen and Mira Beauty; range inferred from two acquisitions whose ownership and full proceeds were not disclosed

nathanbenaich.name: Nathan Benaich
nathanbenaich.headline: Founder and solo GP of Air Street Capital; range inferred from management economics and carry across roughly $400M in reported assets under management

saivc_.name: Sai Senthilkumar
saivc_.headline: Partner at Redpoint; range inferred from career compensation and carried interest, with no disclosed personal holdings

tobi.name: Tobi Lütke
tobi.headline: Founder and CEO of Shopify, e-commerce billionaire

gdb.name: Greg Brockman
gdb.headline: OpenAI co-founder and President, holding a 2.5-3% equity stake in the company

rauchg.name: Guillermo Rauch
rauchg.headline: Cofounder and CEO of Vercel; wealth from his equity stake after Vercel's $300M Series F at a $9.3B valuation

id_aa_carmack.name: John Carmack
id_aa_carmack.headline: Co-founder of id Software (Doom, Quake) and former Oculus/Meta CTO; wealth from the 2009 ZeniMax sale and Oculus acquisition

lexfridman.name: Lex Fridman
lexfridman.headline: Podcaster and MIT research scientist; wealth from podcast/YouTube income, no equity stakes found

chamath.name: Chamath Palihapitiya
chamath.headline: Social Capital founder/CEO and All-In podcast host; early Facebook equity, SPAC deals, and a major Groq stake acquired by Nvidia

aaronlevie.name: Aaron Levie
aaronlevie.headline: Box co-founder and CEO; wealth is almost entirely his documented Box (NYSE: BOX) equity stake per SEC Form 4 filings

patio11.name: Patrick McKenzie
patio11.headline: Writer (Bits about Money) and former senior Stripe employee; accumulated high-income savings, no documented equity exit

shl.name: Sahil Lavingia
shl.headline: Founder/CEO of Gumroad; wealth is largely illiquid private equity last priced at a $100M company valuation

suhail.name: Suhail Doshi
suhail.headline: Co-founder/ex-CEO of Mixpanel ($1.05B valuation) and founder of Playground AI; no disclosed personal stake

tszzl.name: roon
tszzl.headline: Pseudonymous OpenAI member of technical staff; range inferred from OpenAI employee equity compensation norms, not personal disclosures

danielgross.name: Daniel Gross
danielgross.headline: Tech entrepreneur/investor (Cue/Apple exit, ex-YC partner, SSI co-founder, NFDG); Meta's tender offer bought out his personal NFDG fund stakes

jason.name: Jason Calacanis
jason.headline: Angel investor and All-In podcast host; ~300+ angel stakes headlined by a $25K Uber bet worth ~$100M+ at IPO

ylecun.name: Yann LeCun
ylecun.headline: Turing Award AI researcher; wealth from career compensation (Meta/NYU) plus an undisclosed founder equity stake in AMI Labs (co-founded 2025/26, $3.5B pre-money valuation)

drfeifei.name: Fei-Fei Li
drfeifei.headline: Stanford AI professor and cofounder/CEO of World Labs (spatial-intelligence AI startup), valued ~$5B in early 2026
sources: https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-02-18/ai-pioneer-fei-fei-li-s-startup-world-labs-raises-1-billion (corroborated by TechCrunch's Feb 18, 2026 report noting World Labs "declined to say whether the latest round boosted its valuation," and by Bloomberg's Jan 23, 2026 report on ~$5B funding talks)

demishassabis.name: Demis Hassabis
demishassabis.headline: CEO/co-founder of Google DeepMind and Isomorphic Labs; wealth from a decade of Alphabet equity comp plus undisclosed angel stakes (Anthropic, Inflection AI)
sources: https://www.euronews.com/business/2026/05/19/ai-bidding-wars-the-talent-making-a-fortune-as-big-tech-firms-fight-it-out (Euronews business desk, $600M estimate — the only non-SEO-mill press figure)

ilyasut.name: Ilya Sutskever
ilyasut.headline: Cofounder/CEO of Safe Superintelligence (SSI, $32B valuation) and ex-OpenAI cofounder/chief scientist; wealth from a sworn-testimony $7B OpenAI equity stake plus an undisclosed (~15-33%) SSI founder stake
sources: https://www.bloomberg.com/billionaires/profiles/ilya-sutskever/ (corroborated via Forbes testimony report and Wikipedia; direct fetch 403'd but figure independently confirmed twice via search)

andrewyng.name: Andrew Ng
andrewyng.headline: AI educator/investor — wealth mainly from Coursera co-founder equity, AI Fund GP carry, and privately-held DeepLearning.AI/Landing AI stakes
sources: SEC Form 4 filings (CIK 0001851101) via Benzinga/InsiderTrades.com, cross-checked against live COUR price (Yahoo Finance) and Forbes' 2026 / Bloomberg's 2025-2026 AI-billionaires features (Ng absent from both)

alexandr_wang.name: Alexandr Wang
alexandr_wang.headline: Scale AI founder/former CEO, now Meta Chief AI Officer — wealth from ~15%+ equity stake in Scale AI (valued ~$29B after Meta's 2025 investment)

brian_armstrong.name: Brian Armstrong
brian_armstrong.headline: Coinbase cofounder/CEO — wealth is ~14-19% equity stake in Coinbase Global (COIN), tracked live by Forbes/Bloomberg
sources: https://www.forbes.com/profile/brian-armstrong/ (live-fetched July 13, 2026: $7.7B, real-time rank #500, source "cryptocurrency," ~19% Coinbase stake — all directly confirmed)

cdixon.name: Chris Dixon
cdixon.headline: General Partner and founder of a16z crypto; wealth built from carried interest in Andreessen Horowitz funds (incl. huge unrealized/realized gains on Coinbase and other crypto bets) plus two earlier startup exits (SiteAdvisor, Hunch) and pre-a16z angel stakes (Pinterest, Foursquare, Warby Parker, Behance)
sources: No authoritative tracked figure exists. Re-fetched forbes.com/profile/chris-dixon/ live (July 2026) and confirmed it still has NO net_worth field or dollar figure (matches the user's March 2025 Wayback check — 16+ months with Forbes declining to assign him a tracked figure). No Bloomberg Billionaires Index entry found. The $400-500M figure in circulation traces only to low-authority SEO aggregators (blockchainreporter.net, sociallifemagazine.com, valuewalk.com, sophisticatedinvestor.com) that explicitly do NOT cite Forbes or any primary source for the number — direct fetch of blockchainreporter.net confirms it's "the author's own calculation," not a sourced figure. Multiple aggregators independently converging on ~$400-500M (while likely copying each other) plus multiple sources explicitly stating "not a billionaire" is the only corroborating signal available.

rabois.name: Keith Rabois
rabois.headline: PayPal Mafia veteran, Opendoor co-founder, and Khosla Ventures/Founders Fund general partner — wealth built from equity/carry across a dozen-plus startups, not from any confirmed billionaire listing
sources: https://www.forbes.com/profile/keith-rabois/ (independently re-fetched: no net worth shown, only Midas List #66) plus SEC-filing trackers GuruFocus/Benzinga/QuiverQuant showing ~$15-18M disclosed public stock as the only hard floor

davidsacks.name: David Sacks
davidsacks.headline: Venture capitalist (Craft Ventures co-founder/GP) and PayPal Mafia/Yammer alum; wealth from Yammer's $1.2B Microsoft exit, PayPal equity, Craft Ventures carry on a $3.3B+ AUM fund, and early stakes in Facebook/Uber/SpaceX/Airbnb/Palantir
sources: https://www.cnbc.com/2025/03/14/david-sacks-sold-200-million-in-crypto-holdings-before-taking-wh-job.html (corroborated by Forbes profile showing no tracked figure, and Axios/Fortune/White House memo)

reidhoffman.name: Reid Hoffman
reidhoffman.headline: LinkedIn cofounder and Greylock Partners VC; wealth from 2016 LinkedIn/Microsoft sale plus VC portfolio (Airbnb, Aurora, etc.)

bhorowitz.name: Ben Horowitz
bhorowitz.headline: a16z cofounder/GP + Opsware $1.6B exit (2007); no Forbes/Bloomberg-verified net worth exists — estimate is inferred, not sourced from a rated figure
sources: https://www.forbes.com/profile/ben-horowitz/ (confirmed via direct fetch: no personal net worth figure present) cross-checked against https://www.forbes.com/profile/marc-andreessen/ (~$1.9B, Forbes Billionaires #2177) as the only comparable gold-standard data point

fredwilson.name: Fred Wilson
fredwilson.headline: Co-founder/managing partner, Union Square Ventures — wealth from VC carry plus disclosed Coinbase and Etsy board stakes; not a billionaire
sources: SEC Form 4 filings for COIN and ETSY (via StockTitan/GuruFocus), cross-checked against current market prices; Forbes profile confirms no net-worth figure and absence from the Billionaires list

nikitabier.name: Nikita Bier
nikitabier.headline: Serial consumer-app founder (tbh sold to Facebook 2017, Gas sold to Discord 2023) now Head of Product at X; no billionaire/public-market wealth, no dedicated Forbes or Bloomberg net-worth listing exists
sources: https://techcrunch.com/2017/10/16/facebook-acquires-anonymous-teen-compliment-app-tbh-will-let-it-run/ and https://techcrunch.com/2023/01/17/discord-acquires-gas-a-compliments-based-social-media-app-for-teens/ (both confirm undisclosed/sub-$100M terms, directly refuting any precise headline figure)

cobie.name: Cobie (Jordan Fish)
cobie.headline: Crypto trader/investor since 2012, early Lido Finance contributor, and founder of the Echo fundraising platform, which Coinbase acquired for ~$375M (plus a separate $25M NFT purchase) in October 2025

cathiedwood.name: Cathie Wood
cathiedwood.headline: Founder/CEO/CIO of ARK Invest; wealth is an illiquid ~50-75% ownership stake in privately-held ARK plus fee income, not a single traded asset
sources: Bloomberg Billionaires Index (~$220M, cited via coinpaper.com/datawallet.com secondary reporting) for the low anchor; aggregator consensus (datawallet.com, coinpaper.com, celebritynetworth.com, moneywise.com) clustering $250M-$350M for current estimates; Forbes profile (forbes.com/profile/cathie-wood) confirms the $400M 2021 peak / ~$140M 2022 trough trajectory but its real-time figure is JS-rendered and not directly fetchable.

jeremyphoward.name: Jeremy Howard
jeremyphoward.headline: Fast.ai/Answer.AI cofounder and serial entrepreneur (ODG, FastMail, Enlitic exits); no verified net worth, wealth basis is fragmentary and largely modest
sources: Howard v. Goldbloom, Cal. Ct. App. 1st Dist., Dec. 2018 (https://law.justia.com/cases/california/court-of-appeal/2018/a154298.html and https://caselaw.findlaw.com/court/ca-court-of-appeal/1968643.html) — discloses Google's actual Kaggle purchase (~$47.9M + $10M stay bonuses) and Howard's actual merger proceeds (~$700K), contradicting the basis's claim that Kaggle terms were fully undisclosed.
